title: irvingbaileya australis
intro: Irvingbaileya australis, also known as the Tasmanian ironwood or native ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and abrasions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Irvingbaileya australis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
